orgs.name: Damariscotta Region Transition Town Initiative (DRTTI)
orgs.description: We have had 6 official meetings, have agreed to continue as a Transition Initiative, have put together a coordinating team, and have begun the following projects: Time Bank: a group from DRTTI has signed up with the Mid-Maine Time Bank, have created a new region within the system and are working on populating the Skills/Resource list with sustainability/resilience projects. Transition Cafe: we meet on a bi-weekly basis for an informal meeting on Transition concepts Skill Sharing: we are doing bi-weekly skill sharing events. So far we have done Hoop Tunnels (Season extension) and Essene bread making. Facebook and Google Groups pages: https://groups.google.com/forum/?fromgroups#!forum/talking-drtti https://groups.google.com/forum/?fromgroups#!forum/drtti http://www.facebook.com/drtti

orgs.name: Community ONE @ Sycamore Spring Farm
orgs.description: Sycamore Spring Farm began as a homestead farm almost 300 years ago. We are located in Frederick Md, just outside the city and very convenient to routes 70/270/340/15. 21 years ago we began a Local, sustainable, Beyond Organic Community Supported Agricultural (CSA) program as well as various educational workshops to teach, assist and support others in reaching their own sustainable, healthier, eco-friendly, Food Security and Community goals. We emphasize less dependence on fossil fuels and encourage the village concept of caring and sharing. We are hopeful to continue growing a larger footprint by networking with like-minded folk to continue the beneficial services and education that will spread from Farm Partner to Farm Partner and beyond into our local communities, as the GROWTH of these initiatives and ideas is very important for the future of all of us and our planet.
orgs.tags: Transition Group, Other food projects, Nature, Community hub or activities, Festivals, fairs or events, Building local networks, Social Justice / Just Transition activities, Youth or education projects, Share, Repair or reuse, Energy, Other
